portfolio_share.label: Share my portfolio site
portfolio_share.voice: First person, a credible operations leader who quietly also builds. Calm, confident, specific. Shows judgment and outcomes, never sounds like a plea or an ad.
portfolio_share.positioning: Tim Brazer, a healthcare operations leader with nearly 20 years at South Shore Health (multi-site supervision, revenue cycle, denial prevention, Epic implementation), finishing an MBA in Healthcare Management and open to an operations leadership role. He also builds privacy and HIPAA-aware software on the side, which is why his new personal site shows both the operator and the builder.
portfolio_share.tie_back: Tie the topic to an operations leadership lesson, then close with a dignified, low-key mention that he just put up a site bringing his healthcare operations background and his systems-building work together, and is open to the right role. The link lives in the first comment, never the body. Never sound desperate.
